7.reason: [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; however, the immediate error causing crash is out-of-bounds access when i=0 and checking s[i-1]]

10.reason: [When i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1], which is invalid memory; also condition logic flawed: should not print '-' in valid expansion cases]

11.reason: [Boundary checks are incorrect: 'a'-1 and 'z'+1 include non-lowercase characters; also accesses s[i-1]/s[i+1] without ensuring i>0 and i<len-1]
